__fixture__.name: ai_broker_transient_degraded
__fixture__.scenario: The AI runtime / broker host times out on its provider heartbeat past the medium-window threshold. The supervisor kills the stalled host with a watchdog_forced_kill_after_stall and restarts with exponential-jittered backoff. Capability narrows from ready to degraded; provider conversation handles are revoked. The editor and knowledge lanes are unaffected (ai_and_remote_failures_never_block_editing invariant).

heartbeat_snapshot.note: Broker missed three heartbeats; supervisor enforces watchdog kill past threshold.

resource_snapshot.note: provider_overlay lane was in the degraded band; broker stalled awaiting a remote provider response.

capability_envelope_snapshot.note: Broker held two subscription envelopes, one credential alias, and one in-flight provider conversation; conversation handle revoked.

last_good_checkpoint.note: AI broker is a managed boundary; no local checkpoint semantics.

degraded_state_lineage.note: Supervisor killed the broker after three missed heartbeats; capability narrows to degraded and will move to offline if restart fails.

revoked_tickets.note: In-flight provider conversation revoked; any user retry starts a new conversation under re-evaluated policy.
Credential alias invalidated; broker requests a new alias on restart.
AI tool-call subscription revoked; surfaces project degraded with last failure reason.
Provider-route posture subscription revoked; visible disclosure updates on reconnect.
Broker capability envelope revoked; re-issued after policy admission on restart.

emergency_action_linkage.note: No emergency action; transient provider stall.

workspace_scope.note: AI broker is workspace-scoped but runs as a managed boundary, not a resolved execution context.

summary: AI broker stalled past the provider heartbeat budget; supervisor killed and restarted with jittered backoff, revoked the in-flight conversation handle and credential alias, and narrowed capability to degraded. Core editing is unaffected.
